parsed.recommendation_text: The ASUS ZenBook 14 offers remarkable value with an OLED display, lightweight design, and decent performance for under $900. It's ideal for budget-conscious students who need a quality screen for documents, spreadsheets, and web browsing. The Intel Core Ultra 5 processor is less powerful than competitors' Core Ultra 7 or Ryzen 7 but still delivers solid performance.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances price and quality well; OLED display adds value.
